description: Style Note The Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble! Product Description Green thong style sandal Padded,green footbed with printed branding on the heel TPU outsole with a lug at the heel region Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
